creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
The following URLs no longer lead to what's expected: 

<http://elibrary.fultus.com/mergedProjects/FreeBSD%20Documentation/index.htm>

<http://store.fultus.com/advanced_search_result.php?keywords=FreeBSD>

<http://www.fultus.com/free/documentation.phtml>

----

I found things such as this in the Wayback Machine: 

<https://web.archive.org/web/20080820030431/http://elibrary.fultus.com/technical/topic/com.fultus.freebsd/index.html>

– IMHO, not worth linking from the page, so I suggest a rewrite of the paragraphs that contain the outdated links. 

Thanks
